positive: An intricate, symmetrical celestial botanical tapestry featuring bioluminescent peonies and crescent moons integrated with fine silver stardust and delicate constellations. The composition should form a strong, centralized wreath design with clean silhouettes. Style: Highly detailed etching, vintage linocut illustration, cross-hatching technique, limited palette of deep navy and dusty gold ink on a cream background. Perfect for commercial apparel printing, high contrast, elegant symmetry, mythic and whimsical atmosphere.
